Brightfield Energy Inc.
Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
August 8, 2023

OPERATOR: Good afternoon. Welcome to the Brightfield Energy Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Call.

SARAH OKAFOR (CEO): Good afternoon, everyone. Q2 was an excellent quarter for Brightfield. We added 1.2 gigawatts of solar capacity and our wind portfolio performed above seasonal expectations.

We are proud to report that our safety record improved again this quarter — zero lost-time incidents across all construction sites. We attribute this to our enhanced safety training program, which we expanded to our contractor workforce this year.

DAVID LIANG (CFO): Total revenue grew 18% year over year to $820 million. Our operating expenses were well controlled, and we grew adjusted EBITDA by 22%. We are raising full-year guidance to reflect the stronger-than-expected performance in our utility-scale solar segment.

We hired 410 new employees this quarter, primarily engineers and project managers to support our growing pipeline. Total headcount is now 4,200. Average compensation per employee increased 5.1% as we maintain competitive salaries in a tight market for energy sector talent.

SARAH OKAFOR: Our development pipeline now stands at 8.5 gigawatts of late-stage projects. We have long-term power purchase agreements in place for 90% of our expected output through 2030, providing excellent revenue visibility.

Community engagement is central to our development approach. We partner with local governments and tribes to ensure our projects deliver economic benefits to host communities, including prevailing wage commitments on all federally regulated projects.

ANALYST: How are you thinking about financing the capital program?

DAVID LIANG: We have very strong access to capital markets. Our investment-grade credit rating and clean balance sheet allow us to access both project finance debt and corporate bonds at favorable rates. We recently closed a $600 million revolving credit facility that provides ample liquidity.

OPERATOR: Thank you. This concludes the Brightfield Energy Q2 2023 Earnings Call.
